plugins.description: Get Shit Done (GSD) workflow suite — fork of khromov/get-shit-done-cc. Provides /gsd:plan-phase, /gsd:execute-phase, /gsd:discuss-phase, and 80+ other workflow commands plus 22+ sub-agents.
